'''nabunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wubber|wubber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wubber|wubber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nabunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbinith|næbinith]] || [[word:næbinij|næbinij]] || [[word:næbinish|næbinish]] || [[word:næbini|næbini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabubunuth|nabubunuth]] || [[word:nabubunuj|nabubunuj]] || [[word:nabubunush|nabubunush]] || [[word:nabubunu|nabubunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabunuth|nabunuth]] || [[word:nabunuj|nabunuj]] || [[word:nabunush|nabunush]] || [[word:nabunu|nabunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabufnuth|nabufnuth]] || [[word:nabufnuj|nabufnuj]] || [[word:nabufnush|nabufnush]] || [[word:nabufnuf|nabufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nabunuthu|nabunuthu]] || [[word:nabunuju|nabunuju]] || [[word:nabunushu|nabunushu]] || [[word:nabunuku|nabunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nabunuth|nabunuth]] || [[word:nabunuj|nabunuj]] || [[word:nabunush|nabunush]] || [[word:nabunu|nabunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nabunuthul|nabunuthul]] || [[word:nabunujul|nabunujul]] || [[word:nabunushul|nabunushul]] || [[word:nabunukul|nabunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nabunuthuthu|nabunuthuthu]] || [[word:nabunujuju|nabunujuju]] || [[word:nabunushushu|nabunushushu]] || [[word:nabunuku|nabunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nabunuthun|nabunuthun]] || [[word:nabunujun|nabunujun]] || [[word:nabunushun|nabunushun]] || [[word:nabunukun|nabunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nabunuthuoro|nabunuthuoro]] || [[word:nabunujuoro|nabunujuoro]] || [[word:nabunushuoro|nabunushuoro]] || [[word:nabunukuoro|nabunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
